hotel_name: DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Hotel Lancaster

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Over charged on everything and charges my card for stuff I never should have been charged for

reviews.title: Very dishonest business practices.
reviews.positives: The house keeping staff was helpful and kind, the security was pleasant and friendly. The pool and water area were nice.
reviews.negatives: We were not notified of any construction prior to booking or at the time of check in. We were awoken by a jackhammer or hammer drill and when we addressed it with staff were treated as if what we were saying was untrue despite having video of the noise. She said that construction starts at 9am but it started over an hour earlier. She indicated that she had to verify what we were saying due to people trying to get something for nothing, which was strange to me because the deafening noise could easily be heard from the 3 floor in the area of the restaurant and around the elevators. We were traveling with 6 children in our group and sleep is hard to come by. To couple that with the attitude we received from staff made it more frustrating. The general manager was more understanding but was continually overpowered by the other staff member which I believe to be her subordinate. At the end of our conversation the staff said they would be refunding our stay, one employee said one night and the other corrected her by saying both nights would be refunded. We received a received a refund for $50 despite having paid $310.93 for both nights. It is clear the staff was simply trying to make the problem go away without actually making things right. Once we were gone they no longer had any interest in keeping their word.

reviews.title: Ok….not great
reviews.text:
Traveling with two small children visiting the local railroad. Stayed Friday and Saturday night. Our room is on the second floor near the pool. Great for kids as far as proximity to pool. Pool is great. Best thing about the place for us. Toddler area is completely fenced off so you can sit and relax.  Small slide and splash pad is awesome. 
Other than that, I’d say there are better places to stay. Our room is dark and smells musty. Air conditioning is extremely loud. Every time it kicks on it wakes the kids. But the worst part is id say this is a wedding venue that happens to have hotel rooms. Our room is overlooking the center area of the hotel where they are having a wedding. It sounds like the DJ is in our room with us.  I’m not kidding, it’s that loud. It’s 10pm….kids are cranky and tired ….am we are listening to techno dance trying to ho to sleep. It does however drown out the air conditioning 😕 $250 a night could have been better spent elsewhere
reviews.room_type: 2 QN MOBILITY ACCESSIBLE BATHTUB NO SMOK

reviews.title: Staff is good but the hotel has a lot of bedbugs
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: A lot of bedbugs

reviews.title: Family outing
reviews.text: Great location.  We had kids who wanted to play in the arcade. Change machine was broke so couldn’t use any games. At the breakfast buffet we went for food then had all our drinks taken when we came back.

reviews.title: Our room was a complete dump!!!
reviews.positives: The only nice thing about this place was the lobby!!! I thought wow this room Is going to be nice.. and it was a total DUMP. Disgusting dump!!
reviews.negatives: I read the reviews and thought this place sounds great.. I am so upset I paid $320 for this dump!! The lobby looks beautiful then we get to the room 1009 first of all there is no window it’s off the banquet room.. so no window but a second door to lead to the banquet room WHO woild want that?? The light from the banquet room was on all night and we had to stack things to keep the light from coming in.. as soon as we walked in the door we got hit with a mold smell that immediately made me sneeze, then we turn the light on and it was full of mold but painted over to hide it I have pictures of the whole room. Disgusting we were so tired from traveling we didn’t have it in us to fight with anyone for a new room but how they get away with booking this room is beyond me .. we stayed at home 2 Hilton in Lancaster the week before it was gorgeous.. so that’s why I thought I’d try another Hilton. Never again. The paint was chipped off the wall in the bathroom the wall paper was peeling the tile was coming away from the wall on the floor, the “spa tub” we were supposed to have didn’t even work!!! We were so pissed!! And the best part was.. when the air would kick on the front door would rattle with the suction and woke us up the ENTIRE night!!! It sounded like someone was trying to get in. We are FURIOUS and should be refunded neither of us even were able to sleep.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I won't recommend the restaurant. Kids' burgers taste horrible. I'd rather take my kids outside to eat or they be starved

reviews.title: Overpriced by a lot and under serviced
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Under renovation that we were not told about. No restaurant or. Bar. Housekeeping was inconsistent. I had to go to the front desk every night for the replacement items that were not replaced. It smelled and the room was dark and dingy. It looked like a 1970’s dorm room. It was not worth the price booking charged us. Also the maid made the bed with the remote in the bed. No replacement coffee, creamer, stirrers or water. A wet washcloth was left in the shower. Our 1st room, the tv didn’t work so they changed our room after we had unpacked. Used coffee pod was left in the machine. The list continues.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I really enjoyed my stay at this hotel! The location is perfect – very convenient and close to everything I needed. The room was clean and comfortable, and the staff were friendly and helpful. The only downside was that there was no microwave in the room, which would have been really useful. Other than that, everything was great and I would definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: Was expecting more and got a lot less.
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: When people usually leave their room at 10:30 in the morning and comeback at 8:30 at night you’d expect your room to be cleaned. My room was not cleaned and the front desk person couldn’t do anything for me. Very unprofessional for a hotel associated with the Hilton corp.

reviews.title: Great Place
reviews.text: Great place and friendly staff. Kids had a great time.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Een heerlijk hotel, uitstekende (schone) kamers waarvan de binnenring uitkijkt op het "pleintje" met palmbomen. Prijs/kwaliteit is meer dan goed. Het ontbijt ook.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: facility is good
reviews.negatives: service not good

reviews.title: Great location, interior but staff service is lacking.
reviews.positives: Clean, modern hotel in beautiful surroundings
reviews.negatives: Wifi was not reliable.  Even the TV connection was unstable due to the Wifi being unreliable.  Also, the service was spotty.  I would call the mainline for assistance and no one would pick up.  Also when I arrived, no one was at the desk.  The lady was on a phone call regarding a problem with the smoke alarm.  And when I did get her attention she didn't seem very interested in helping.

reviews.title: Very unhappy about the stay.
reviews.negatives: Shower handle fell off and was told it needed 2 hrs to be fixed. It was 9pm and the hotel was sold out, so we had to take shower at the public shower next to swimming pool. Very bad experience.

reviews.title: It was just ok, for the money spent it should have been much better.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: We weren’t told that there would be a special event with a very large family reunion throughout the weekend. Not only did these people take over the entire hotel but they had a DJ on Saturday night that rumbled our room until 10pm. Considering the cost to stay here I would have liked to know about the event ahead of time. There were also people standing out front of the hotel drinking beer and smoking weed. You had to hold your breath while walking in due to the heavy smell of weed. I feel as tho the hotel staff should have told them to at least go to the side of the building.

reviews.title: Convenient location made up for deficits.
reviews.positives: Room was clean. Mattresses comfortable.
reviews.negatives: Staff was minimally helpful. Room overlooked venue. Breakfast ridiculously overpriced. No free wi-fi.

reviews.title: Would not go there again.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: I loved the service. The grounds were beautiful. It is close to the city of Lancaster and centrally located to other activities in the area. The cookies at check-in were a nice touch.
reviews.negatives: The rooms felt muggy and had a strong odor similar to dirty laundry and a locker room. We didn't have a window to the outside, which made the room feel claustrophobic.

reviews.title: Definitely not worth the money
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives:
Price was absurd for what they offered 
Took hot tub out and never replaced

Staff at front desk not friendly at all  seemed liked they were being bothered to help

reviews.title: Pleasant stay but too expensive for the location, service and overall experience.
reviews.positives: The room was a good size, clean, and comfortable. Parking was easy, and the grounds behind the hotel (the little pond) were nice. The location offered reasonable proximity to places one might want to visit, with nearby amenities including grocery stores, a Starbucks, and several shopping malls. Breakfast was good with several different options.
reviews.negatives: While every single person of the room cleaning staff was delightful, the reception desk and the breakfast crew were hit or miss. Some were pleasant, others seemed not to want to be there, and others went through the motions begrudgingly. It is called a resort, but it feels like a run-of-the-mill hotel. For the location and service, the cost should have been significantly lower.

reviews.title: Basic: Not worth the price
reviews.positives: Pool hours and room cleanliness
reviews.negatives:
No microwave. Breakfast buffet cost per value. Staff inadequately trained. No trash bag in trash can.  Price of room too high for amount of amenities offered.
PS I ordered a smoothie no dairy and service staff accidentally put a small amount of yogurt. When her and a senior employee were told that it would be okay for them to just make it and not add any additional dairy, the senior staff member whispered to the newer employee to add an extra ingredient. This was cottage cheese which I found out after taking the first sips upon returning to my room. This made me sick and unable to drink my drink. The employee who seemed to have more experience was rude and ungenuinne. Poor customer service skills.

reviews.title: Next time I'll try the hotel directly for my reservations
reviews.negatives: The description you had for this room was "King with Spa Bathroom". It was a King, but the bathroom was nothing special. I think we grossly overpaid for this room by using Booking.com. When I go to the hotel website directly and look at King rooms, it appears we could have had the same room for at least $100 less per night. Very disappointing.

reviews.title: Spacious spa tub in double queen room for couple with kids.
reviews.positives:
Front desk, coffee shop, and breakfast cafe staff were all friendly and professional.
The mini convenient shop in the lobby next to the front desk has a great selection of  premade food, snacks, drinks, swin dipaers,  toiletry items, and microwave for guest use. Any item, that you might have forgotten to pack or might need on vacation, could be paid with card, cash or charged to room.  

 The hotel had an amazing layout with elevators and exits to the parking lots conveniently located. The entire facility was clean and well maintained. 

 The pool was warm with great hours( 8am to 10 pm), and the kids' pool area was perfect for littles to play in the shallow water with a slide and water jets throughout the area. 
Kis water play area had  slightly cooler water, but that might have been from them fixing an issue.  Our only disappointment is with the lack of hot tub in the pool area. It was permanently closed and tiled over. 

The room was a good layout for a family of 5 (three littles) with two queens and a spacious bathroom with a stand-alone shower and a jeted spa tub (~3' x5'). Room temperature control had a wide range (going under 60 degrees F), which was an amazing bonus along with the great water pressure for showering and high temperature water for the spa tub. 

Breakfast started at 6 am to 10 am, was good with made-to-order omelets, French toast, and two other options with side orders of hash browns, sausage, or bacon including other traditional continental breakfast items like cereal, hot oatmeal, fresh fruit with yogurt and, baked goods. 

The coffee shop and wine café are both amazing amenities for this upscale hotel with a kid friendly pool area along with a spacious spa tub room with two queens. .
reviews.negatives: We were disappointed with the closed hot tub in the pool area.

reviews.negatives: Breakfast was like any other chains however most offer free breakfast not $30 out of pocket extra on top of an expensive one night stay.

reviews.title: Clean, friendly, nice pool
reviews.positives: Very pretty , nice size room
reviews.negatives: The windows look out on the indoor atrium and I miss the natural light

reviews.title: If I need to stay again I would come there.
reviews.positives: Great location.
reviews.negatives: The room was really nice. The only problem was the items in the shower were empty. The body wash and shampoo. We had to call and request some. We didn't bring our own because we were only staying one night. They brought the items we  ended right away except they accidentally brought the shampoo and body lotion. We just used the shampoo as a body wash. Nice room, nice staff.

reviews.positives: The inside is very nice
reviews.negatives: Cost is way to high

reviews.title: Perfect Got a wonderful cookie!!
reviews.positives: Everything
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Great resort with kids splash zone/indoor pool while coming to see Thomas at Strasburg
reviews.positives: We last stayed at this hotel when it was the Willow Valley Resort and much has changed in this area (part of the hotel and old restaurant is demolished). The hotel sent an email asking if we would like to upgrade our room for $10/night, however, only based on availability when we checked in. I asked when checked in if we received it and were told they were sold out, so we would have the room we originally booked, To our surprise, we did in fact have the upgraded with additional space, which was greatly appreciated with 2 babies. The beds were comfortable and we were happy to see they still had both the indoor pool and kids splash/play area. Shower pressure was great too!
reviews.negatives: This is an odd thing to say, but there were just no garbage cans anywhere on the property. Nothing just outside the doors when you arrive and nothing in the lobby. Had to carry garbage all the way to our room. The garbage cans in our room were tiny, Thankfully we had some paper bags we brought with us to serve as our garbage cans in the room.

reviews.title: It was great to have a clean and quiet place so near my family.
reviews.positives: I did not eat any of the food because I just used the hotel for sleeping.  I was in town for a family reunion and spent most of the time with them.
reviews.negatives: I wish the price was lower.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
When we got there we were welcomed very nicely and very pleasant.
They were also extremely accommodating to our specific needs
reviews.negatives: Can't think of anything i didn't like honestly

reviews.title: Exceptional property and wonderful experience!!!
reviews.positives: Overall, this particular DoubleTree Resort is always lovely! It never disappoints! We’ve been coming here with my family for several years now and we always keep coming back to this exact location. We always have such a great stay. The staff, especially Audrey, our waitress at Cafe 24 was so pleasant :-) The beds are always super comfortable. The overall updates in renovations are nicely done around the property. Lastly, we love the beautiful foliage and potted plants all throughout the property. They add such a charming, elegant touch. Overall, this DoubleTree is exceptional!!!
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.negatives: The TV was not good
